## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Rafid and Bianca Nieves to discuss collaboration on content creation and AI workflow development for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rafid's current role: Contractor writing LinkedIn posts for GrowthX executives; transitioning to broader content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [New projects: Repurposing podcast clips, ghostwriting for GrowthX page, and expanding AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Workflow improvements: Centralizing processes in Notion, weekly sync calls, and involving engineers for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [New team member: Rafid's friend to join as a part-time contractor for editing and copywriting support](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Creation Process

  - [Rafid works with Jason on LinkedIn posts for GrowthX executives](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Process involves gathering client thoughts on topics (sync/async)](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Uses transcripts and context from meetings to craft content](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Aims to match client's tone and voice in writing](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Currently using a mix of tools: Notion, Assembly, LinkedIn for ideation](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### Upcoming Content Projects

  - [Repurposing external podcast clips featuring Marcel for social media](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Ghostwriting for GrowthX page, especially for event-related content](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Expanding content creation from individual executives to GrowthX's main channel](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Bianca to provide a Notion brief outlining all potential projects](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)

### Workflow and Tools

  - [Current tools: Notion for briefs, Assembly for post scheduling and approvals](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Goal: Streamline processes by centralizing everything in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Bianca recently added to Assembly, will need assistance navigating the platform](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Weekly sync calls to start, transitioning to bi-weekly after initial period](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)

### Team Expansion

  - [Rafid proposing to bring in a friend as a part-time contractor (15-20 hours/week)](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [New contractor to assist with editing clips and copywriting](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Proposed rate: $12-13/hour (compared to Rafid's $20/hour)](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Bianca to facilitate onboarding process, including NDA and contractor setup](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### AI Workstream Development

  - [Rafid seeking assistance to scale AI-driven content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Aim to implement workstream for all clients, not just current 4](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Request for engineer involvement (1-2 hours/week) to develop the system](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Bianca to act as liaison between Rafid and the engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/VreXzPaUwjCshXz5f_skvBzktLt9fNDu?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
